arts.ttl: Accusation of Arsenal and Manchester City being used in effort to ‘blackmail’ club over transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester City have found themselves being used in an effort by Manfred Ugalde’s agents to ‘blackmail’ Spartak Moscow, according to claims from Russia today. The story is according to Russian outlet Mash, who report that neither Arsenal nor Manchester City have serious interest in the striker.
